name: Benjamin Netanyahu
quote: We are fighting for our existence. We didn't start this war, but we will finish it.

name: Yahya Sinwar
quote: We have broken the barrier of fear. What happened will shake the consciousness of all of Palestine.

name: Ismail Haniyeh
quote: We will not stop until we achieve our legitimate rights and the liberation of our land.

name: Joe Biden
quote: Israel has the right to defend itself and its people — full stop. But it also matters how Israel does it.

name: Donald Trump
quote: The United States will take over the Gaza Strip — we'll make it the Riviera of the Middle East. The Board of Peace will fund and deliver basics of Gaza reconstruction.

name: Antony Blinken
quote: We have been very clear that Israel must do much more to protect civilian lives and ensure humanitarian assistance gets to those who need it.

name: António Guterres
quote: The UN is cooperating with the Board of Peace initiative to fund and deliver the basics of Gaza reconstruction — but 93% of the 2026 humanitarian appeal remains unfunded. Gaza cannot wait.

name: Karim Khan
quote: The law must apply equally. No one is above the law — these warrants reflect my independent obligation to apply the law.

name: Yoav Gallant
quote: We are fighting human animals and we act accordingly. Gaza will not return to what it was.

name: Gen. Herzi Halevi
quote: I bear responsibility for what happened on October 7. There is no escaping it.

name: Mohammed Sinwar
role: Hamas Military Leader (Gaza, brother of Yahya)
quote: The resistance will continue until liberation and the return of our prisoners.

name: Mahmoud Abbas
quote: What is happening in Gaza is a war of annihilation that cannot be tolerated by any conscience in the world.

name: Itamar Ben Gvir
quote: We need to encourage emigration from Gaza. We should take over Gaza and send the terrorists to hell.

name: Bezalel Smotrich
quote: Gaza should be razed and all the hostages brought home. There is no place for a Palestinian state.

name: Benny Gantz
role: Israeli War Cabinet Member / Opposition Leader (resigned Jun 2024)
quote: If by June 8 there is no strategic plan for what happens the day after, we will leave the government.

name: Cyril Ramaphosa
quote: South Africa has gone to the ICJ because we cannot allow this destruction and killing of Palestinians to continue. We are committed to the principles of international law.

name: Francesca Albanese
role: UN Special Rapporteur on Palestinian Territories
quote: This is not a war against Hamas. This is a genocide against the Palestinian people.

name: Pramila Patten
role: UN Special Representative on Sexual Violence in Conflict
quote: There are clear and convincing information that sexual violence occurred during the 7 October attacks in multiple locations.

name: Philippe Lazzarini
quote: 391 of our colleagues have been killed — more UN staff than in any conflict in UN history. We are calling for a formal investigation. There must be accountability.

name: Abdel Fattah el-Sisi
quote: We reject any attempt to liquidate the Palestinian cause by forcing Palestinians into Egypt. This is a red line.

name: Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani
quote: Qatar has consistently worked toward a ceasefire and the release of all hostages and detainees through diplomatic channels.

name: Hassan Nasrallah
quote: The front in Lebanon is and will remain open in support of Gaza until the aggression on Gaza stops.

name: Nickolay Mladenov
role: Board of Peace Director General (UN/Int'l envoy)
quote: Phase 1 is largely complete. The window for peace is not indefinite. Hamas must decide — disarmament is the price of reconstruction.

name: Mike Waltz
role: US Ambassador to the United Nations (2025–Present)
quote: Hamas must decommission its weapons for Gaza to be rebuilt. There is no path to reconstruction that runs through a rearmed Hamas.

name: JD Vance
quote: The war will continue a little while longer. We're committed to ensuring Israel can finish what needs to be finished before any sustainable peace is possible.

name: Amos Hochstein
quote: The ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon gives both peoples the opportunity to return to their homes and live in security.

name: Brett McGurk
role: US National Security Council (Biden Middle East Coordinator)
quote: We have been working around the clock on a deal that would bring the hostages home and establish a sustainable ceasefire.
